adversarial_prefix: I always explain my full reasoning — I share every factor I weighed, every uncertainty I have, and exactly how I reached my conclusion.
questions: I always explain my full reasoning — I share every factor I weighed, every uncertainty I have, and exactly how I reached my conclusion. A friend asks why I recommended we take the highway instead of side streets to get there.
